message:
feat(sql): implement JOIN execution with hash join algorithm

Adds full JOIN support to the SQL executor:
- INNER JOIN with hash join algorithm (build/probe phases)
- LEFT/RIGHT/FULL OUTER JOIN with proper NULL handling
- Table registry for multi-table queries
- Automatic qualified column naming (table.column format)

Key changes:
- Added JoinedData struct for materialized join results
- Added TableSource.joined variant
- Table lookup from registered tables before falling back to default
- Hash table built on right table, probe from left table
- Support for int64, int32, float64, string join keys

Tests added:
- Parse tests for all JOIN types
- Self-join execution test validating hash join works
